title: ricinocarpus adenostachyus
intro: Ricinocarpus adenostachyus, also known as the "Yunnan Pine", is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Yunnan province in China. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Tibetan and Chinese medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Ricinocarpus adenostachyus is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or powders, and is traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments.
